title.en: But it is too difficult for the Kasa wisdom bod...

content.en:
The super-dimensional rules were raised to the level of fifteen realms, and Ye Tian was not in a hurry to improve the realm of super-dimensional rules in the future.

And he can't quickly improve the realm of extradimensional rules at present, if there is no big opportunity in the future, he will have to slowly improve.

As for cultivation, he has a multi-repair refining treasure bottle, which can condense the essence of multi-maintenance refining in the Three Realms to ensure that the improvement of cultivation is very fast, and with his current cultivation speed, at most a thousand extra-dimensional epoch times, he can raise his cultivation to the peak realm of the third realm.

In addition to improving his cultivation and comprehending the rules of the extradimensional dimension, Ye Tian spent most of his time cultivating the wisdom body of the Ka Ye.

His innate multi-dimensional Dao body was a beginner, and if he was promoted to the first level of Xiaocheng realm, his strength would inevitably skyrocket.

But it is too difficult for the Kasa wisdom body to improve.

Even if it is a mutilated black mist multi-dimensional body, it can absorb the energy of the black mist realm and slowly improve, but it is extremely difficult to ascend to the Xiaocheng realm, let alone a higher-grade Ka Ye wisdom body.

Ye Tian really wanted to cultivate the Jiaye Wisdom Body to the first level of the Xiaocheng Realm, but the resources that could help the innate multi-dimensional Dao Body improve were too rare, and it was estimated that the Five Thousand Territory was also extremely rare, and those big forces would not take it out for trading.

And the most suitable treasure place for the cultivation of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body is undoubtedly the Ka Ye Wisdom Tree, but the Ka Ye Wisdom Tree is not in the territory of No. 5,000, but in the territory of No. 4,000, which is a place where he can't go for the time being~.

"Take your time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

In the blink of an eye, more than a hundred extradimensional epochs have passed.

Compared with the past, Ye Tian's progress is not great, after all, when he reaches the realm of cultivation and strength, it is very difficult to skyrocket significantly, except that there is a great opportunity.

And during this time, he was also studying the black statue, but he still couldn't study it.

But he also guaranteed that this black statue was very extraordinary, it was not an ordinary object, and its material was extremely tough, even with his cultivation, it could not destroy this material.

Ye Tian guessed that this black statue was an innate multi-dimensional treasure, but it was not of any use at the moment.

"Maybe I really need to advance to the fourth realm before I can hope to know the secret of this black statue!"

Ye Tian felt that the value of this black statue might still be on top of a multi-dimensional treasure vase.

Ye Tian's strength has not improved much, but the strength of the human race has improved a lot.

Ye Tian's relatives have all advanced to the second realm, but they are all very low-key.

Moreover, Ye Tian used the fourth-layer Great Realm Armor Technique to build a new Terran Temple, those Terran powerhouses stayed here, and they were protected by the fourth-layer Great Realm Armor Technique, even if the Fourth Realm passed by, they would not be able to perceive their existence.

In this way, the strength of the Terrans will not be exposed.

When he cultivates to break through to the fourth realm in the future, he will dare to disclose the strength of the human race, and he can even cultivate a large number of extradimensional realms of the human race.

After all, the strength of the fourth realm is enough to keep a super dimensional treasure bottle.

A single super-dimensional treasure bottle is just a sub-bottle of the innate multi-dimensional supreme treasure multi-dimensional treasure bottle, which cannot attract the existence of the fifth realm, and with the cultivation of the fourth realm, it can naturally be kept in the territory of the Liuren.

And when Ye Tian was cultivating in a low-key manner, something happened in the territory of No. 5692.

Territory No. 5692.

this day.

In a treasure place, many extradimensional creatures are discussing.

Suddenly.

One by one, vines flew out, binding up the extradimensional creatures one by one, absorbing the flesh and blood of these extradimensional creatures, and killing them.

Among these extradimensional creatures, there is the existence of the peak of the second realm and even the early stage of the third realm.

But even so, they were killed.

Of course.

This battle affected too much, and the other Third Realm cultivators in the entire Five Thousand Six Hundred and Ninety-two Territory sensed it, and they were immediately shocked.

Whew!!!

The existence of the third realm rushed over, and their strength was extremely strong, and a few of them reached the peak realm of the third realm, but they were not afraid of encountering danger.

However, they didn't really enter the treasure land, just snooped from a distance.

"It's the sea of dead vines, what happened there, why so many extradimensional creatures have been killed!"

"There are more than sixty third-realm extra-dimensional creatures in the withered vine forest sea, and thousands of extra-dimensional creatures in the second realm, but only a few have come out alive. It is only known that the vines bombarded them, but the origin of this vine is not known for sure. "

0 for flowers0

"The attack of the vines is terrifying, reaching the level of the top third realm, and there are many of them, once we enter the third realm, we will be sent to death at all. "

"So what to do?"

"What else can I do, the matter here will definitely be publicized, and those overlord-level extradimensional forces will inevitably come over at that time. I don't think this matter is necessarily dangerous, maybe there is a chance, but it's important to you!"

"That's not necessarily, this is the Sea of Withered Vines and Forests, one of the Three Treasure Lands of our 5,692nd Territory, and only the Third Realm is allowed to exist in it. The existence of the fourth realm can't enter the sea of dead vines and forests, and we really hope to get some benefits from it. "

Suddenly, these extradimensional realms of the third realm showed their expectations one after another.

Soon after.

Some extradimensional forces have come over one after another.

Blazing Yang Palace, Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce, Tianxuan Sword Alliance, and other overlord-level forces have all sent a large number of Third Realm Extradimensional Realms over.

Among them, these extra-dimensional forces are dominated by the three overlord-level forces of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce, the Immortal Ancient Sect, and the Multidimensional Realm River Mountain, because these three forces have the most fourth realms, all of them have more than ten fourth realms, and they all have the existence of the peak of the fourth realm.

Other hegemon-level extradimensional forces, relatively speaking, are still a notch lower.

After the third realm of these overlord-level extradimensional forces came over, they quickly passed on the news.

After a while, the fourth realm of the First Venerable came over.

The fool also knows that the matter of the withered vines and forests is not simple, otherwise it will not attract the fourth realm to come, and it is likely to be a great opportunity, not a danger.

As a result, many third realms are famous, and they want to see if they can get some benefits.

At the same time, the Fourth Realm of these overlord-level forces met together, and each overlord-level force had at least one Fourth Realm existence.

At this point, they were all excited.

The Blazing Sun Realm Lord, one of the two Fourth Realms of the Blazing Yang Palace, couldn't wait to say: "Everyone, the information in the sea of withered vines and forests must be blocked, and the information of Duowei Baohu must not be leaked, otherwise once it is leaked, then the competition will be over!"

"It may not be possible to block the news, too much of the Third Realm knows, maybe there will be a well-informed Third Realm who will guess it. The other Fourth Realm frowned and said Nine.
